objective: 產品問題衝刺: 補強長期未覆蓋的產品領域: action_system_enhancement
task_draft_markdown:
產品問題衝刺: 補強長期未覆蓋的產品領域: action_system_enhancement

User Value: 1 product areas have had no sprint in 30+ days: action_system_enhancement. These areas have accumulated unaddressed product debt that affects user experience.

Product Maturity Impact: Unbalanced product development creates gaps in user experience quality. The neglected area "action_system_enhancement" likely has the highest opportunity for improvement relative to effort.

Expected Change: The action_system_enhancement area receives at least one concrete improvement that measurably advances user value in that domain.

Objective: Focus this sprint entirely on "action_system_enhancement". Make the highest-impact change possible in that area.

Phase 1: Audit the current state of "action_system_enhancement" in the codebase. What exists? What is broken or missing? What do users encounter?
Phase 2: Identify the single highest-impact change. Think: what is the one thing a user in this area needs most?
Phase 3: Implement that change. Keep scope tight — one real improvement is better than five half-finished ideas.
Phase 4: Run make backend-test and npm run build. Document what changed and why it matters to the user.

Scope: backend/app/, frontend/app/platform/action-system-enhancement/
Acceptance Criteria: At least one concrete, tested change in the action_system_enhancement area; make backend-test passes; npm run build passes.
focus_keys: action_system_enhancement, product_debt
expected_duration_minutes: 480

rejection_reasons: CONTENT_TOO_SHALLOW: draft has 86 chars and 0 content lines (need ≥200 chars and ≥3 phases/scope/acceptance lines). A genuine 8-hour task requires detailed objective, phased steps, scope, and acceptance criteria.
MISSING_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: task must include acceptance criteria (e.g., "Acceptance Criteria:", "驗收條件:", or checkable completion conditions).
